1:
Sula is determined to do what she can to see the burden of guilt lifted from Pasareen's shoulders. To that end, she proposes looking for a memento to remind Pasareen of Dazahl and help her accept his loss. Sula suggests retracing the path the villagers fled down while searching for anything that might have been left behind.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.
